revision.comment: スタブ
revision.text:
'''辛未'''（かのとひつじ、しんび）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて8番目で、前は[[庚午]]、次は[[壬申]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は金、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（土生金）である。
==辛未の年==
==辛未の日== ===[[選日]]=== 辛未の日は[[犯土|大土]]の2日目である。

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''辛未'''（かのとひつじ、しんきんのひつじ、しんび）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの8番目で、前は[[庚午]]、次は[[壬申]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[未]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==辛未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って11が余る年が辛未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[11年]] *[[71年]] *[[131年]] *[[191年]] *[[251年]] *[[311年]] *[[371年]] *[[431年]] *[[491年]] *[[551年]] *[[611年]] *[[671年]] *[[731年]] *[[791年]] *[[851年]] *[[911年]] *[[971年]] | *[[1031年]] *[[1091年]] *[[1151年]] *[[1211年]] *[[1271年]] *[[1331年]] *[[1391年]] *[[1451年]] *[[1511年]] *[[1571年]] *[[1631年]] *[[1691年]] *[[1751年]] *[[1811年]] *[[1871年]] *[[1931年]] *[[1991年]] | *[[2051年]] *[[2111年]] *[[2171年]] *[[2231年]] *[[2291年]] *[[2351年]] *[[2411年]] *[[2471年]] *[[2531年]] *[[2591年]] *[[2651年]] *[[2711年]] *[[2771年]] *[[2831年]] *[[2891年]] *[[2951年]] |}
==辛未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[6月]]が辛未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛未の日== 辛未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 辛未の日は[[犯土|大土]]の2日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{辛未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:辛未]]

{{干支}} '''辛未'''（かのとひつじ、しんきんのひつじ、しんび）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの8番目で、前は[[庚午]]、次は[[壬申]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[未]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''辛未'''（かのとひつじ、しんきんのひつじ、しんび）は、[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの8番目で、前は[[庚午]]、次は[[壬申]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[未]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==辛未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って11が余る年が辛未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[11年]] *[[71年]] *[[131年]] *[[191年]] *[[251年]] *[[311年]] *[[371年]] *[[431年]] *[[491年]] *[[551年]] *[[611年]] *[[671年]] *[[731年]] *[[791年]] *[[851年]] *[[911年]] *[[971年]] | *[[1031年]] *[[1091年]] *[[1151年]] *[[1211年]] *[[1271年]] *[[1331年]] *[[1391年]] *[[1451年]] *[[1511年]] *[[1571年]] *[[1631年]] *[[1691年]] *[[1751年]] *[[1811年]] *[[1871年]] *[[1931年]] *[[1991年]] | *[[2051年]] *[[2111年]] *[[2171年]] *[[2231年]] *[[2291年]] *[[2351年]] *[[2411年]] *[[2471年]] *[[2531年]] *[[2591年]] *[[2651年]] *[[2711年]] *[[2771年]] *[[2831年]] *[[2891年]] *[[2951年]] |}
==辛未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[6月]]が辛未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛未の日== 辛未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 辛未の日は[[犯土|大土]]の2日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Goat-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Goat-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Goat}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:辛未]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''辛未'''（かのとひつじ、しんきんのひつじ、しんび）は、[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの8番目で、前は[[庚午]]、次は[[壬申]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[未]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==辛未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って11が余る年が辛未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[11年]] *[[71年]] *[[131年]] *[[191年]] *[[251年]] *[[311年]] *[[371年]] *[[431年]] *[[491年]] *[[551年]] *[[611年]] *[[671年]] *[[731年]] *[[791年]] *[[851年]] *[[911年]] *[[971年]] | *[[1031年]] *[[1091年]] *[[1151年]] *[[1211年]] *[[1271年]] *[[1331年]] *[[1391年]] *[[1451年]] *[[1511年]] *[[1571年]] *[[1631年]] *[[1691年]] *[[1751年]] *[[1811年]] *[[1871年]] *[[1931年]] *[[1991年]] | *[[2051年]] *[[2111年]] *[[2171年]] *[[2231年]] *[[2291年]] *[[2351年]] *[[2411年]] *[[2471年]] *[[2531年]] *[[2591年]] *[[2651年]] *[[2711年]] *[[2771年]] *[[2831年]] *[[2891年]] *[[2951年]] |}
==辛未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[6月]]が辛未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛未の日== 辛未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 辛未の日は[[犯土|大土]]の2日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Goat-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Goat-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Goat}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:辛未]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''辛未'''（かのとひつじ、しんきんのひつじ、しんび）は、[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの8番目で、前は[[庚午]]、次は[[壬申]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[未]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==辛未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って11が余る年が辛未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[11年]] *[[71年]] *[[131年]] *[[191年]] *[[251年]] *[[311年]] *[[371年]] *[[431年]] *[[491年]] *[[551年]] *[[611年]] *[[671年]] *[[731年]] *[[791年]] *[[851年]] *[[911年]] *[[971年]] | *[[1031年]] *[[1091年]] *[[1151年]] *[[1211年]] *[[1271年]] *[[1331年]] *[[1391年]] *[[1451年]] *[[1511年]] *[[1571年]] *[[1631年]] *[[1691年]] *[[1751年]] *[[1811年]] *[[1871年]] *[[1931年]] *[[1991年]] | *[[2051年]] *[[2111年]] *[[2171年]] *[[2231年]] *[[2291年]] *[[2351年]] *[[2411年]] *[[2471年]] *[[2531年]] *[[2591年]] *[[2651年]] *[[2711年]] *[[2771年]] *[[2831年]] *[[2891年]] *[[2951年]] |}
==辛未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[6月]]が辛未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛未の日== 辛未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 辛未の日は[[犯土|大土]]の2日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Goat-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛未]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Goat-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Goat}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:辛未]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Metal Goat]]

==辛未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って11が余る年が辛未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[11年]] *[[71年]] *[[131年]] *[[191年]] *[[251年]] *[[311年]] *[[371年]] *[[431年]] *[[491年]] *[[551年]] *[[611年]] *[[671年]] *[[731年]] *[[791年]] *[[851年]] *[[911年]] *[[971年]] | *[[1031年]] *[[1091年]] *[[1151年]] *[[1211年]] *[[1271年]] *[[1331年]] *[[1391年]] *[[1451年]] *[[1511年]] *[[1571年]] *[[1631年]] *[[1691年]] *[[1751年]] *[[1811年]] *[[1871年]] *[[1931年]] *[[1991年]] | *[[2051年]] *[[2111年]] *[[2171年]] *[[2231年]] *[[2291年]] *[[2351年]] *[[2411年]] *[[2471年]] *[[2531年]] *[[2591年]] *[[2651年]] *[[2711年]] *[[2771年]] *[[2831年]] *[[2891年]] *[[2951年]] |}
==辛未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[6月]]が辛未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛未の日== 辛未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 辛未の日は[[犯土|大土]]の2日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Goat-qq]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:辛未]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:辛未]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Goat-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[ja:辛未]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Metal Goat]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 辛未'''（かのとひつじ、しんきんのひつじ、しんび）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの8番目で、前は[[庚午]]、次は[[壬申]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[未]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==辛未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って11が余る年が辛未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[11年]] *[[71年]] *[[131年]] *[[191年]] *[[251年]] *[[311年]] *[[371年]] *[[431年]] *[[491年]] *[[551年]] *[[611年]] *[[671年]] *[[731年]] *[[791年]] *[[851年]] *[[911年]] *[[971年]] | *[[1031年]] *[[1091年]] *[[1151年]] *[[1211年]] *[[1271年]] *[[1331年]] *[[1391年]] *[[1451年]] *[[1511年]] *[[1571年]] *[[1631年]] *[[1691年]] *[[1751年]] *[[1811年]] *[[1871年]] *[[1931年]] *[[1991年]] | *[[2051年]] *[[2111年]] *[[2171年]] *[[2231年]] *[[2291年]] *[[2351年]] *[[2411年]] *[[2471年]] *[[2531年]] *[[2591年]] *[[2651年]] *[[2711年]] *[[2771年]] *[[2831年]] *[[2891年]] *[[2951年]] |}
==辛未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[6月]]が辛未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛未の日== 辛未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 辛未の日は[[犯土|大土]]の2日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] revision.comment: Text replacement - "-qq]]" to "—>[[category:qq close]]"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 辛未'''（かのとひつじ、しんきんのひつじ、しんび）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの8番目で、前は[[庚午]]、次は[[壬申]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[未]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==辛未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って11が余る年が辛未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[11年]] *[[71年]] *[[131年]] *[[191年]] *[[251年]] *[[311年]] *[[371年]] *[[431年]] *[[491年]] *[[551年]] *[[611年]] *[[671年]] *[[731年]] *[[791年]] *[[851年]] *[[911年]] *[[971年]] | *[[1031年]] *[[1091年]] *[[1151年]] *[[1211年]] *[[1271年]] *[[1331年]] *[[1391年]] *[[1451年]] *[[1511年]] *[[1571年]] *[[1631年]] *[[1691年]] *[[1751年]] *[[1811年]] *[[1871年]] *[[1931年]] *[[1991年]] | *[[2051年]] *[[2111年]] *[[2171年]] *[[2231年]] *[[2291年]] *[[2351年]] *[[2411年]] *[[2471年]] *[[2531年]] *[[2591年]] *[[2651年]] *[[2711年]] *[[2771年]] *[[2831年]] *[[2891年]] *[[2951年]] |}
==辛未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[6月]]が辛未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛未の日== 辛未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 辛未の日は[[犯土|大土]]の2日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Goat—>[[category:qq close]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:辛未]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:辛未]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Goat—>[[category:qq close]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|辛未}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|壬申}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Wèi|ja|未}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, forming a {{ill|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)|ja|相生}} (Earth generating Metal).
== Xīnwèi Years == A year in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[11]] *[[71]] *[[131]] *[[191]] *[[251]] *[[311]] *[[371]] *[[431]] *[[491]] *[[551]] *[[611]] *[[671]] *[[731]] *[[791]] *[[851]] *[[911]] *[[971]] | *[[1031]] *[[1091]] *[[1151]] *[[1211]] *[[1271]] *[[1331]] *[[1391]] *[[1451]] *[[1511]] *[[1571]] *[[1631]] *[[1691]] *[[1751]] *[[1811]] *[[1871]] *[[1931]] *[[1991]] | *[[2051]] *[[2111]] *[[2171]] *[[2231]] *[[2291]] *[[2351]] *[[2411]] *[[2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[2891]] *[[2951]] |}
== Xīnwèi Months == In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}), the {{ill|6th Month|ja|6月}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lesser Heat|ja|小暑}} to the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}).
== Xīnwèi Days == Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:辛未]]

=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:辛未]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[ja:X" to "[[sn:"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|辛未}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|壬申}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Wèi|ja|未}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, forming a {{ill|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)|ja|相生}} (Earth generating Metal).
== Xīnwèi Years == A year in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[11]] *[[71]] *[[131]] *[[191]] *[[251]] *[[311]] *[[371]] *[[431]] *[[491]] *[[551]] *[[611]] *[[671]] *[[731]] *[[791]] *[[851]] *[[911]] *[[971]] | *[[1031]] *[[1091]] *[[1151]] *[[1211]] *[[1271]] *[[1331]] *[[1391]] *[[1451]] *[[1511]] *[[1571]] *[[1631]] *[[1691]] *[[1751]] *[[1811]] *[[1871]] *[[1931]] *[[1991]] | *[[2051]] *[[2111]] *[[2171]] *[[2231]] *[[2291]] *[[2351]] *[[2411]] *[[2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[2891]] *[[2951]] |}
== Xīnwèi Months == In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}), the {{ill|6th Month|ja|6月}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lesser Heat|ja|小暑}} to the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}).
== Xīnwèi Days == Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:辛未]]

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|壬申}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Wèi|ja|未}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, forming a {{ill|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)|ja|相生}} (Earth generating Metal).
== Xīnwèi Years == A year in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[11]] *[[71]] *[[131]] *[[191]] *[[251]] *[[311]] *[[371]] *[[431]] *[[491]] *[[551]] *[[611]] *[[671]] *[[731]] *[[791]] *[[851]] *[[911]] *[[971]] | *[[1031]] *[[1091]] *[[1151]] *[[1211]] *[[1271]] *[[1331]] *[[1391]] *[[1451]] *[[1511]] *[[1571]] *[[1631]] *[[1691]] *[[1751]] *[[1811]] *[[1871]] *[[1931]] *[[1991]] | *[[2051]] *[[2111]] *[[2171]] *[[2231]] *[[2291]] *[[2351]] *[[2411]] *[[2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[2891]] *[[2951]] |}
== Xīnwèi Months == In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}), the {{ill|6th Month|ja|6月}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lesser Heat|ja|小暑}} to the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}).
== Xīnwèi Days == Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:辛未]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Trimming off this bad category]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|辛未}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|壬申}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Wèi|ja|未}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, forming a {{ill|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)|ja|相生}} (Earth generating Metal).
== Xīnwèi Years == A year in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[11]] *[[71]] *[[131]] *[[191]] *[[251]] *[[311]] *[[371]] *[[431]] *[[491]] *[[551]] *[[611]] *[[671]] *[[731]] *[[791]] *[[851]] *[[911]] *[[971]] | *[[1031]] *[[1091]] *[[1151]] *[[1211]] *[[1271]] *[[1331]] *[[1391]] *[[1451]] *[[1511]] *[[1571]] *[[1631]] *[[1691]] *[[1751]] *[[1811]] *[[1871]] *[[1931]] *[[1991]] | *[[2051]] *[[2111]] *[[2171]] *[[2231]] *[[2291]] *[[2351]] *[[2411]] *[[2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[2891]] *[[2951]] |}
== Xīnwèi Months == In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}), the {{ill|6th Month|ja|6月}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lesser Heat|ja|小暑}} to the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}).
== Xīnwèi Days == Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:辛未]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Qq close]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:{{subst:PAGENAME}}}}[[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|辛未}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|壬申}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Wèi|ja|未}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, forming a {{ill|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)|ja|相生}} (Earth generating Metal).
== Xīnwèi Years == A year in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[11]] *[[71]] *[[131]] *[[191]] *[[251]] *[[311]] *[[371]] *[[431]] *[[491]] *[[551]] *[[611]] *[[671]] *[[731]] *[[791]] *[[851]] *[[911]] *[[971]] | *[[1031]] *[[1091]] *[[1151]] *[[1211]] *[[1271]] *[[1331]] *[[1391]] *[[1451]] *[[1511]] *[[1571]] *[[1631]] *[[1691]] *[[1751]] *[[1811]] *[[1871]] *[[1931]] *[[1991]] | *[[2051]] *[[2111]] *[[2171]] *[[2231]] *[[2291]] *[[2351]] *[[2411]] *[[2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[2891]] *[[2951]] |}
== Xīnwèi Months == In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}), the {{ill|6th Month|ja|6月}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lesser Heat|ja|小暑}} to the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}).
== Xīnwèi Days == Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:辛未]]

{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[11]] *[[71]] *[[131]] *[[191]] *[[251]] *[[311]] *[[371]] *[[431]] *[[491]] *[[551]] *[[611]] *[[671]] *[[731]] *[[791]] *[[851]] *[[911]] *[[971]] | *[[1031]] *[[1091]] *[[1151]] *[[1211]] *[[1271]] *[[1331]] *[[1391]] *[[1451]] *[[1511]] *[[1571]] *[[1631]] *[[1691]] *[[1751]] *[[1811]] *[[1871]] *[[1931]] *[[1991]] | *[[2051]] *[[2111]] *[[2171]] *[[2231]] *[[2291]] *[[2351]] *[[2411]] *[[2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[2891]] *[[2951]] |}
== Xīnwèi Months == In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}), the {{ill|6th Month|ja|6月}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lesser Heat|ja|小暑}} to the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}).
== Xīnwèi Days == Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:辛未]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:new pages]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|辛未}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|壬申}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Wèi|ja|未}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, forming a {{ill|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)|ja|相生}} (Earth generating Metal).
== Xīnwèi Years == A year in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[11]] *[[71]] *[[131]] *[[191]] *[[251]] *[[311]] *[[371]] *[[431]] *[[491]] *[[551]] *[[611]] *[[671]] *[[731]] *[[791]] *[[851]] *[[911]] *[[971]] | *[[1031]] *[[1091]] *[[1151]] *[[1211]] *[[1271]] *[[1331]] *[[1391]] *[[1451]] *[[1511]] *[[1571]] *[[1631]] *[[1691]] *[[1751]] *[[1811]] *[[1871]] *[[1931]] *[[1991]] | *[[2051]] *[[2111]] *[[2171]] *[[2231]] *[[2291]] *[[2351]] *[[2411]] *[[2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[2891]] *[[2951]] |}
== Xīnwèi Months == In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}), the {{ill|6th Month|ja|6月}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lesser Heat|ja|小暑}} to the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}).
== Xīnwèi Days == Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土}}.
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:辛未]]

However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lesser Heat|ja|小暑}} to the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}).
== Xīnwèi Days == Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土}}.

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|辛未}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|壬申}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Wèi|ja|未}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, forming a {{ill|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)|ja|相生}} (Earth generating Metal).
== Xīnwèi Years == A year in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.

However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lesser Heat|ja|小暑}} to the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}).
== Xīnwèi Days == Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土}}.
[[ja:辛未]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|陰陽五行思想}}" to "|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and the Five Phases}}"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|辛未}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|壬申}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and the Five Phases}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Wèi|ja|未}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, forming a {{ill|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)|ja|相生}} (Earth generating Metal).
== Xīnwèi Years == A year in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[11]] *[[71]] *[[131]] *[[191]] *[[251]] *[[311]] *[[371]] *[[431]] *[[491]] *[[551]] *[[611]] *[[671]] *[[731]] *[[791]] *[[851]] *[[911]] *[[971]] | *[[1031]] *[[1091]] *[[1151]] *[[1211]] *[[1271]] *[[1331]] *[[1391]] *[[1451]] *[[1511]] *[[1571]] *[[1631]] *[[1691]] *[[1751]] *[[1811]] *[[1871]] *[[1931]] *[[1991]] | *[[2051]] *[[2111]] *[[2171]] *[[2231]] *[[2291]] *[[2351]] *[[2411]] *[[2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[2891]] *[[2951]] |}
== Xīnwèi Months == In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}), the {{ill|6th Month|ja|6月}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lesser Heat|ja|小暑}} to the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}).
== Xīnwèi Days == Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土}}.
[[ja:辛未]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|辛未}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|壬申}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Wèi|ja|未}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, forming a {{ill|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)|ja|相生}} (Earth generating Metal).
== Xīnwèi Years == A year in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[11]] *[[71]] *[[131]] *[[191]] *[[251]] *[[311]] *[[371]] *[[431]] *[[491]] *[[551]] *[[611]] *[[671]] *[[731]] *[[791]] *[[851]] *[[911]] *[[971]] | *[[1031]] *[[1091]] *[[1151]] *[[1211]] *[[1271]] *[[1331]] *[[1391]] *[[1451]] *[[1511]] *[[1571]] *[[1631]] *[[1691]] *[[1751]] *[[1811]] *[[1871]] *[[1931]] *[[1991]] | *[[2051]] *[[2111]] *[[2171]] *[[2231]] *[[2291]] *[[2351]] *[[2411]] *[[2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[2891]] *[[2951]] |}
== Xīnwèi Months == In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}), the {{ill|6th Month|ja|6月}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lesser Heat|ja|小暑}} to the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}).
== Xīnwèi Days == Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土}}.
[[ja:辛未]]

{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[11]] *[[71]] *[[131]] *[[191]] *[[251]] *[[311]] *[[371]] *[[431]] *[[491]] *[[551]] *[[611]] *[[671]] *[[731]] *[[791]] *[[851]] *[[911]] *[[971]] | *[[1031]] *[[1091]] *[[1151]] *[[1211]] *[[1271]] *[[1331]] *[[1391]] *[[1451]] *[[1511]] *[[1571]] *[[1631]] *[[1691]] *[[1751]] *[[1811]] *[[1871]] *[[1931]] *[[1991]] | *[[2051]] *[[2111]] *[[2171]] *[[2231]] *[[2291]] *[[2351]] *[[2411]] *[[2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[2891]] *[[2951]] |}
== Xīnwèi Months == In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}), the {{ill|6th Month|ja|6月}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lesser Heat|ja|小暑}} to the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}).
== Xīnwèi Days == Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土}}.
[[ja:辛未]]

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|壬申}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Wèi|ja|未}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土}}, forming a {{ill|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)|ja|相生}} (Earth generating Metal).
== Xīnwèi Years == A year in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.

However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lesser Heat|ja|小暑}} to the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋}}).
== Xīnwèi Days == Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土}}.

=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=draft|12=draft}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|辛未|12=draft|12=draft}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支|12=draft|12=draft}}.
It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|12=draft|12=draft}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|壬申|12=draft|12=draft}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=draft|12=draft}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=draft|12=draft}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金|12=draft|12=draft}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Wèi|ja|未|12=draft|12=draft}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土|12=draft|12=draft}}, forming a {{ill|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)|ja|相生|12=draft|12=draft}} (Earth generating Metal).
== Xīnwèi Years == A year in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦|12=draft|12=draft}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[11]] *[[71]] *[[131]] *[[191]] *[[251]] *[[311]] *[[371]] *[[431]] *[[491]] *[[551]] *[[611]] *[[671]] *[[731]] *[[791]] *[[851]] *[[911]] *[[971]] | *[[1031]] *[[1091]] *[[1151]] *[[1211]] *[[1271]] *[[1331]] *[[1391]] *[[1451]] *[[1511]] *[[1571]] *[[1631]] *[[1691]] *[[1751]] *[[1811]] *[[1871]] *[[1931]] *[[1991]] | *[[2051]] *[[2111]] *[[2171]] *[[2231]] *[[2291]] *[[2351]] *[[2411]] *[[2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[2891]] *[[2951]] |}
== Xīnwèi Months == In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=draft|12=draft}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}}), the {{ill|6th Month|ja|6月|12=draft|12=draft}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|Lesser Heat|ja|小暑|12=draft|12=draft}} to the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|12=draft|12=draft}}).
== Xīnwèi Days == Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=draft|12=draft}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=draft|12=draft}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} <!--Yin Metal Goat--> <!--Yin Metal Goat-->

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|辛未|12=draft|12=draft}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支|12=draft|12=draft}}.
It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|12=draft|12=draft}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|壬申|12=draft|12=draft}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=draft|12=draft}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=draft|12=draft}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金|12=draft|12=draft}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Wèi|ja|未|12=draft|12=draft}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|土|12=draft|12=draft}}, forming a {{ill|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)|ja|相生|12=draft|12=draft}} (Earth generating Metal).
== Xīnwèi Years == A year in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦|12=draft|12=draft}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[11]] *[[71]] *[[131]] *[[191]] *[[251]] *[[311]] *[[371]] *[[431]] *[[491]] *[[551]] *[[611]] *[[671]] *[[731]] *[[791]] *[[851]] *[[911]] *[[971]] | *[[1031]] *[[1091]] *[[1151]] *[[1211]] *[[1271]] *[[1331]] *[[1391]] *[[1451]] *[[1511]] *[[1571]] *[[1631]] *[[1691]] *[[1751]] *[[1811]] *[[1871]] *[[1931]] *[[1991]] | *[[2051]] *[[2111]] *[[2171]] *[[2231]] *[[2291]] *[[2351]] *[[2411]] *[[2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[2891]] *[[2951]] |}
== Xīnwèi Months == In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=draft|12=draft}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}}), the {{ill|6th Month|ja|6月|12=draft|12=draft}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} or the {{ill|Solar Terms|ja|節月|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|Lesser Heat|ja|小暑|12=draft|12=draft}} to the day before {{ill|Beginning of Autumn|ja|立秋|12=draft|12=draft}}).
== Xīnwèi Days == Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=draft|12=draft}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=draft|12=draft}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} <!--Yin Metal Goat--> <!--Yin Metal Goat-->
[[cdo:Sin-cṳ̄de]][[nds:Metall-Bokenevi]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-chá]][[zh-yue:辛未]] {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:辛未]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Goat]][[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:辛未]] [[sn:Yin Metal Goat]] [[en:Yin Metal Goat]] [[zh:辛未]] [[ko:신미 (간지)]] [[fr:Chèvre de métal]] [[de:Metall-Schaf]] [[sn:in Metal Goat]] [[af:Metaalbok (astrologie)]] [[de:Metall-Bokeen]] [[en:Metal Goat]] [[fr:Chèvre de métalboishak]] [[it:Sin-chṳ́id]] [[sn:inwaja]] [[vi:Tân Mùi]] [[za:Sincceij]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Metal Goat}} [[ar:Yin Metal Goat]]

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.

==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).

=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.

==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.

hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a [[:en:Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ Branch]] {{ill|Wèi|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a [[:en:Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly ==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Wèi|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a [[:en:Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.

==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly
