==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

(土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a [[:en:Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Wèi|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20128396}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a [[:en:Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Wèi|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi

--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

(土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a [[:en:Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Wèi|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20128396}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a [[:en:Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi

==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Wèi|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20128396}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a [[:en:Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

(wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a [[:en:Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Wèi|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a [[:en:Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Wèi|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20128396}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a [[:en:Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

(土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a [[:en:Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a [[:en:Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ
