(土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a [[:en:Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly --> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.

==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Wèi|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a [[:en:Aioi|Generating Cycle (Wuxing)]] (Earth generating Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *[[:en:71|71]] *[[:en:131|131]] *[[:en:191|191]] *[[:en:251|251]] *[[:en:311|311]] *[[:en:371|371]] *[[:en:431|431]] *[[:en:491|491]] *[[:en:551|551]] *[[:en:611|611]] *[[:en:671|671]] *[[:en:731|731]] *[[:en:791|791]] *[[:en:851|851]] *[[:en:911|911]] *[[:en:971|971]] | *[[:en:1031|1031]] *[[:en:1091|1091]] *[[:en:1151|1151]] *[[:en:1211|1211]] *[[:en:1271|1271]] *[[:en:1331|1331]] *[[:en:1391|1391]] *[[:en:1451|1451]] *[[:en:1511|1511]] *[[:en:1571|1571]] *[[:en:1631|1631]] *[[:en:1691|1691]] *[[:en:1751|1751]] *[[:en:1811|1811]] *[[:en:1871|1871]] *[[:en:1931|1931]] *[[:en:1991|1991]] | *[[:en:2051|2051]] *[[:en:2111|2111]] *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]]), the [[:en:June|6th Month]] is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとひつじ (kanoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんきんのひつじ (shinkin-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *{{ill|71|en|71|WD=Q4643093|lt=71}} *{{ill|131|en|131|WD=Q395788|lt=131}} *{{ill|191|en|191|WD=Q31751|lt=191}} *{{ill|251|en|251|WD=Q30304|lt=251}} *{{ill|311|en|311|WD=Q564280|lt=311}} *{{ill|371|en|371|WD=Q48018|lt=371}} *{{ill|431|en|431|WD=Q32146|lt=431}} *{{ill|491|en|491|WD=Q30315|lt=491}} *{{ill|551|en|551|WD=Q30943|lt=551}} *{{ill|611|en|611|WD=Q31790|lt=611}} *{{ill|671|en|671|WD=Q30722|lt=671}} *{{ill|731|en|731|WD=Q23566|lt=731}} *{{ill|791|en|791|WD=Q31078|lt=791}} *{{ill|851|en|851|WD=Q29966|lt=851}} *{{ill|911|en|911|WD=Q83119|lt=911}} *{{ill|971|en|971|WD=Q23717|lt=971}} | *{{ill|1031|en|1031|WD=Q19315|lt=1031}} *{{ill|1091|en|1091|WD=Q19468|lt=1091}} *{{ill|1151|en|1151|WD=Q19642|lt=1151}} *{{ill|1211|en|1211|WD=Q5251|lt=1211}} *{{ill|1271|en|1271|WD=Q5523|lt=1271}} *{{ill|1331|en|1331|WD=Q6000|lt=1331}} *{{ill|1391|en|1391|WD=Q6378|lt=1391}} *{{ill|1451|en|1451|WD=Q6455|lt=1451}} *{{ill|1511|en|1511|WD=Q6188|lt=1511}} *{{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571}} *{{ill|1631|en|1631|WD=Q6860|lt=1631}} *{{ill|1691|en|1691|WD=Q7682|lt=1691}} *{{ill|1751|en|1751|WD=Q7615|lt=1751}} *{{ill|1811|en|1811|WD=Q6928|lt=1811}} *{{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} *{{ill|1931|en|1931|WD=Q18782|lt=1931}} *{{ill|1991|en|1991|WD=Q2062|lt=1991}} | *{{ill|2051|en|2051|WD=Q49926|lt=2051}} *{{ill|2111|en|2111|WD=Q19694703|lt=2111}} *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}}), the {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=6th Month}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Lesser Heat}} to the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}}).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly ==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}}), the {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=6th Month}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Lesser Heat}} to the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}}).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīnwèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīnwèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ ==Months of Yin Metal Goat==
In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}}), the {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=6th Month}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Lesser Heat}} to the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}}).

==Days of Yin Metal Goat==
Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.

=== Selected Days ===
A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīnwèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīnwèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: shinbi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi

==Years of Yin Metal Goat==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.

==Months of Yin Metal Goat==
In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}}), the {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=6th Month}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Lesser Heat}} to the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}}).

==Days of Yin Metal Goat==
Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.

=== Selected Days ===
A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: shinbi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi

--> ==Years of Yin Metal Goat== A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Xīnwèi Years''' |- ![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]] |- | *[[:en:Qq|Qq]] *{{ill|71|en|71|WD=Q4643093|lt=71}} *{{ill|131|en|131|WD=Q395788|lt=131}} *{{ill|191|en|191|WD=Q31751|lt=191}} *{{ill|251|en|251|WD=Q30304|lt=251}} *{{ill|311|en|311|WD=Q564280|lt=311}} *{{ill|371|en|371|WD=Q48018|lt=371}} *{{ill|431|en|431|WD=Q32146|lt=431}} *{{ill|491|en|491|WD=Q30315|lt=491}} *{{ill|551|en|551|WD=Q30943|lt=551}} *{{ill|611|en|611|WD=Q31790|lt=611}} *{{ill|671|en|671|WD=Q30722|lt=671}} *{{ill|731|en|731|WD=Q23566|lt=731}} *{{ill|791|en|791|WD=Q31078|lt=791}} *{{ill|851|en|851|WD=Q29966|lt=851}} *{{ill|911|en|911|WD=Q83119|lt=911}} *{{ill|971|en|971|WD=Q23717|lt=971}} | *{{ill|1031|en|1031|WD=Q19315|lt=1031}} *{{ill|1091|en|1091|WD=Q19468|lt=1091}} *{{ill|1151|en|1151|WD=Q19642|lt=1151}} *{{ill|1211|en|1211|WD=Q5251|lt=1211}} *{{ill|1271|en|1271|WD=Q5523|lt=1271}} *{{ill|1331|en|1331|WD=Q6000|lt=1331}} *{{ill|1391|en|1391|WD=Q6378|lt=1391}} *{{ill|1451|en|1451|WD=Q6455|lt=1451}} *{{ill|1511|en|1511|WD=Q6188|lt=1511}} *{{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571}} *{{ill|1631|en|1631|WD=Q6860|lt=1631}} *{{ill|1691|en|1691|WD=Q7682|lt=1691}} *{{ill|1751|en|1751|WD=Q7615|lt=1751}} *{{ill|1811|en|1811|WD=Q6928|lt=1811}} *{{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} *{{ill|1931|en|1931|WD=Q18782|lt=1931}} *{{ill|1991|en|1991|WD=Q2062|lt=1991}} | *{{ill|2051|en|2051|WD=Q49926|lt=2051}} *{{ill|2111|en|2111|WD=Q19694703|lt=2111}} *[[:en:2171|2171]] *[[:en:2231|2231]] *[[:en:2291|2291]] *[[:en:2351|2351]] *[[:en:2411|2411]] *[[:en:2471|2471]] *[[2531]] *[[2591]] *[[2651]] *[[2711]] *[[2771]] *[[2831]] *[[:en:2891|2891]] *[[:en:2951|2951]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}}), the {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=6th Month}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Lesser Heat}} to the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}}).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīnwèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīnwèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.
It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto ==Months of Yin Metal Goat== In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}), the {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=6th Month|1=June}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Lesser Heat|1=Xiaoshu}} to the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}}).
==Days of Yin Metal Goat== Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.
=== Selected Days === A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīnwèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīnwèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Wèi|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a {{ill|Aioi|en|Aioi|WD=Q4697552|lt=Generating Cycle (Wuxing)|1=Aioi}} (Earth generating Metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: shinbi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi

==Months of Yin Metal Goat==
In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}), the {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=6th Month|1=June}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Lesser Heat|1=Xiaoshu}} to the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}}).

==Days of Yin Metal Goat==
Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.

=== Selected Days ===
A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīnwèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīnwèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: shinbi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi

==Months of Yin Metal Goat==
In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}), the {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=6th Month|1=June}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Lesser Heat|1=Xiaoshu}} to the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}}).

==Days of Yin Metal Goat==
Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.

=== Selected Days ===
A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: shinbi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi

==Months of Yin Metal Goat==
In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}), the {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=6th Month|1=June}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Lesser Heat|1=Xiaoshu}} to the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}}).

==Days of Yin Metal Goat==
Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.

=== Selected Days ===
A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
